[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000110 2
1 110011000 4
2 110001000 3
3 101101000 4
4 001000011 3
5 110011100 5
6 100011000 3
7 000000110 2
